description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the coderus/sailfishos-platform-sdk-base:latest Docker image and runs `source onyx.env` as a global before_script. Define a single stage named build and a job called run-build in that stage that executes the shell command `./run-mic.sh`. Configure the job to publish as artifacts all zip files matching `sfe-*/*.zip`, and restrict the job to run only on the `web` branch using an only rule.
